creator: judah.levine@colorado.edu
text:
command: ftn77 -c <fortran source file>.f always exits with error:
            Error on line 0: Invalid flag '-o'
ftn77 compiler built and installed from 9.0 ports collection.

Port is named f77, but installed compiler is ftn77. Is this a change or a mistake?

How-To-Repeat: Error happens with any Fortran source file
